etymology.description: semantic 月(月) (yuè, "moon; meat") + phonetic 玄(玄) (xuán, "mysterious") -> mysterious like the moon
etymology.interpretation: The character 肙 is a combination of semantic 月(月) (yuè, "moon; meat") which implies a corporeal or tangible aspect, and phonetic 玄(玄) (xuán, "mysterious") suggesting something elusive or unknown. The moon's mysterious and elusive nature parallels the meaning of mysterious.
